final:
module d_flip_flop (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input d,
    output reg q
);

always @(posedge clk, negedge rst) begin
    if (~rst) begin
        q <= 1;
    end else begin
        q <= ~d;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= d; // This line is intentionally misleading
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: q <= d; // This line is intentionally misleading
